_meta.source: NICE NG106 (Chronic heart failure in adults), CG187 (Acute heart failure)
_meta.note: Phase 2 will populate with curated NG106 + CG187 rule entries

diuresis_rules.description: In acute decompensated HF with fluid overload, consider IV loop diuretic escalation
Monitor renal function and electrolytes within 48h of loop diuretic change

raas_rules.description: Consider holding ACE-I/ARB if eGFR < 30 or rising creatinine > 30% baseline

sglt2_rules.description: Continue SGLT2i in HFrEF unless contraindicated (eGFR < 20)
